caribbean.headline: Calm Seas Ahead
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing 17 kt winds with 7.0 ft wave heights and a less than 10% rain probability is not observed, instead a 32% rain probability, while Bimini has 21 kt winds. The Western Caribbean will see these conditions persist with the dominant swell direction coming from the SE and a max swell period of 7 s.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Sees Calm Conditions
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing a less than 10% rain probability with max winds of 14 kt and wave heights of 3.1 ft, while nearby ports such as Venice have similar conditions with max winds of 12 kt. I expect these calm conditions to prevail throughout the day, with the dominant swell direction remaining WNW and swell period at 13 s, making for a smooth sailing day in the Mediterranean.
